chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.494 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hg of case 29.01.2026 Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor ANF. Mr. Umar Farooq, advocate for respondent. It is informed that trial has been completed and the case is fixed for announcement of judgment. We therefor feel that this application filed for cancellation of bail has become virtually infructuous and is therefore accordingly disposed of in view of the settled principle that when the case is ripe and fixed for announcement of judgment, the bail granted to the accused in the trial cannot be cancelled. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
